ddls:
CREATE TABLE "user_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., Follower growth, Listed growth) */,
  "mean_value" REAL /* Mean value of the metric */,
  "median_value" REAL /* Median value of the metric */,
  "std_deviation" REAL /* Standard deviation of the metric */,
  "min_value" INTEGER /* Minimum value of the metric */,
  "max_value" INTEGER /* Maximum value of the metric */,
  "metric_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the metric */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of metric (e.g., follower growth, engagement rate) */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the metric (e.g., percentage, count, ratio) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the user group (e.g., Group A, Group B) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the user group */,
  "group_category" TEXT /* Category of the user group (e.g., age, location, interests) */,
  "group_size" INTEGER /* Number of users in the group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metric_to_group" (
  "association_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the association */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user group */,
  "association_date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was associated with the user group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("association_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metric_to_group_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES user_groups ("group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metric_to_group_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES user_metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username on the social media platform */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Social media platform (e.g., Twitter, Instagram) */,
  "follower_count_initial" INTEGER /* Initial number of followers */,
  "friend_count_initial" INTEGER /* Initial number of friends or connections */,
  "user_type" TEXT /* Type of user (e.g., individual, business, influencer) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metric_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date when the metric was recorded */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the metric data (e.g., API, web scraping, manual entry) */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the metric data (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metric_data_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metric_data_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES user_metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set up the alert */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric to monitor */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for triggering the alert */,
  "notification_sent" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the notification has been sent */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., threshold breach, anomaly detection) */,
  "alert_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the alert (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "notification_channel" TEXT /* Channel for sending notifications (e.g., email, SMS, in-app notification) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES user_metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user for whom the recommendation is made */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric that triggered the recommendation */,
  "recommendation_text" TEXT /* Text describing the recommended action */,
  "date_recommended" TEXT /* Date when the recommendation was made */,
  "recommendation_type" TEXT /* Type of recommendation (e.g., content optimization, engagement strategy) */,
  "recommendation_priority" TEXT /* Priority of the recommendation (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "recommendation_status" TEXT /* Status of the recommendation (e.g., pending, in progress, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES user_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., login, like, comment, share) */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date when the activity occurred */,
  "activity_data" TEXT /* Additional data related to the activity (e.g., content ID, engagement metrics) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "social_media_platforms" (
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each platform */,
  "platform_name" TEXT /* Name of the social media platform */,
  "platform_description" TEXT /* Description of the social media platform */,
  "api_endpoint" TEXT /* API endpoint for the social media platform */,
  "auth_token" TEXT /* Authentication token for the social media platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("platform_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "platform_user" (
  "platform_user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each platform user */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* ID of the social media platform */,
  "platform_username" TEXT /* Username on the social media platform */,
  "platform_profile_picture" TEXT /* Profile picture on the social media platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("platform_user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_platform_user_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_platform_user_platform_id FOREIGN KEY ("platform_id") REFERENCES social_media_platforms ("platform_id")
)
